languages.text: {n}Гальванические витки манипулуса трещат и через его ладони, вспыхнув лазурью, проходит мощный разряд прямо в грудь Нунциуса. Техножрец вздрагивает всем телом, после чего замирает навсегда. Бережно убрав руку покойника со своей, Эоганн какое-то время смотрит на него. Наконец, решительный взмахом мехаденрита он отсекает голову коллеги. Забрав ее, он водружает у подножья сацеллума сервочереп, паривший у него за плечом.{/n} "Я свершил то, что должно. Теперь я готов встать на путь искупления сам. Я отлучаю себя от секты Ксенаритов и посвящаю себя Поиску знания так, как это было установлено в канонах Его. {name}, спасибо, что вы были рядом".

{n}Eogunn's galvanic coils crackle, and a powerful discharge passes from his hands directly into Nuncius's chest in a flash of azure. Nuncius's entire body shudders, then goes still forever. Gently removing the dead man's hand from his own, Eogunn stares at him for a time. Finally, with a decisive swing of his mechadendrite, he cuts off his colleague's head, and takes it. Then, he takes the servo-skull that has been hovering at his shoulder and sets it at the foot of the stasis sacellum.{/n} "I have done what I had to do. Now I am ready to walk the path of atonement myself. I excommunicate myself from the xenarite sect and dedicate myself to the Quest for Knowledge as it has been established in His covenants. {name}, thank you for being with me."

languages.text: {n}Las bobinas galvánicas de Eogunn chisporrotean, y una potente descarga se transmite desde sus manos directamente hasta el pecho de Nuncius con un destello azul. El cuerpo de Nuncius se sacude y luego se queda quieto para siempre. El tecnosacerdote aparta la mano del difunto con sumo tacto y lo contempla durante unos instantes. Finalmente, con un gesto decisivo de su mecadendrita, decapita a su colega y toma su cabeza. Luego coge el servocráneo que flota sobre a su hombro y lo deposita a los pies del sacelio de suspensión.{/n} «He hecho lo que debía. Estoy listo para recorrer la senda de la expiación. Declaro mi excomunión de la secta xenarita y me consagro a la búsqueda del conocimiento como estipulan Sus preceptos. {name}, gracias por haberme acompañado en este trance».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's galvanic coils crackle, and a powerful discharge passes from his hands directly into Nuncius's chest in a flash of azure. Nuncius's entire body shudders, then goes still forever. Gently removing the dead man's hand from his own, Eogunn stares at him for a time. languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的电流线圈噼啪作响，一道强大的电流闪过，湛蓝的弧光从他的双手直接贯入努恩修斯的胸口。努恩修斯浑身剧烈一颤，随后彻底归于静止。伊奥贡轻轻移开死者搭在自己手上的手，凝视了他一会儿。最后，他的机械触须利落一挥，斩下了同僚的头颅，执于手中。接着，他把一直悬在肩旁的伺服头骨取下，放在静滞神龛的脚下。{/n}“我做了我该做的。现在我也该踏上赎罪之路了。我将自己逐出异形科技派，今后恪守祂的圣约，全心投入求知远征。{name}，谢谢您陪着我。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's galvanic coils crackle, and a powerful discharge passes from his hands directly into Nuncius's chest in a flash of azure. Nuncius's entire body shudders, then goes still forever. Gently removing the dead man's hand from his own, Eogunn stares at him for a time. Finally, with a decisive swing of his mechadendrite, he cuts off his colleague's head, and takes it. Then, he takes the servo-skull that has been hovering at his shoulder and sets it at the foot of the stasis sacellum.{/n} "I have done what I had to do. languages.text: {n}Dans le crépitement de ses bobines galvaniques, Eogunn génère une puissante décharge qui passe directement de ses mains à la poitrine de Nuncius en produisant un éclair d'azur. Nuncius frémit de tout son corps, avant de s'immobiliser à jamais. Le technoprêtre retire délicatement la main qui tenait la sienne, sans quitter son collègue des yeux, puis il lui tranche la tête d'un coup décisif de sa mécadendrite et la prend. Enfin, il saisit le servocrâne qui flottait près de son épaule et le pose au pied du sacellum de stase.{/n} « J'ai fait ce que j'avais à faire. Je suis maintenant prêt à m'engager moi-même sur la voie de la rédemption. Je m'excommunie de la secte des xénarites pour me consacrer pleinement à la Quête de la Connaissance telle qu'elle a été établie par les préceptes de l'Omnimessie. {name}, je vous remercie d'être {mf|resté|restée} à mes côtés. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's galvanic coils crackle, and a powerful discharge passes from his hands directly into Nuncius's chest in a flash of azure. Nuncius's entire body shudders, then goes still forever. Gently removing the dead man's hand from his own, Eogunn stares at him for a time. Finally, with a decisive swing of his mechadendrite, he cuts off his colleague's head, and takes it. Then, he takes the servo-skull that has been hovering at his shoulder and sets it at the foot of the stasis sacellum.{/n} "I have done what I had to do. Now I am ready to walk the path of atonement myself. I excommunicate myself from the xenarite sect and dedicate myself to the Quest for Knowledge as it has been established in His covenants. {name}, thank you for being with me."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un galvaniz bobinleri çatırdıyor, ellerinden doğrudan Nuncius'un göğsüne doğru masmavi bir parlamayla güçlü bir salınım geçiyor. Nuncius'un tüm bedeni titriyor, sonra sonsuza dek hareketsiz kalıyor. Ölü adamın elini kendi elinden nazikçe çeken Eogunn, bir süre ona bakıyor. Sonunda mekadentritinin kararlı savruluşuyla meslektaşının kafasını kesip alıyor. Omzunda süzülen hizmeleti alıp staz şapelinin dibine yerleştiriyor.{/n} "Yapmam gerekeni yaptım. Artık ben de kefaret yolunda yürümeye hazırım. Kendimi zenarit tarikatından aforoz ediyor ve O'nun ahitlerinde tesis edildiği şekliyle İrfan Arayışı'na adıyorum. Yanımda olduğunuz için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's galvanic coils crackle, and a powerful discharge passes from his hands directly into Nuncius's chest in a flash of azure. Nuncius's entire body shudders, then goes still forever. Gently removing the dead man's hand from his own, Eogunn stares at him for a time. Finally, with a decisive swing of his mechadendrite, he cuts off his colleague's head, and takes it. Then, he takes the servo-skull that has been hovering at his shoulder and sets it at the foot of the stasis sacellum.{/n} "I have done what I had to do. Now I am ready to walk the path of atonement myself. I excommunicate myself from the xenarite sect and dedicate myself to the Quest for Knowledge as it has been established in His covenants. {name}, thank you for being with me."

Yanımda olduğunuz için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir."

languages.text: {n}Eogunns galvanische Spulen knistern, ehe eine mächtige Entladung aus seinen Händen in Gestalt eines azurblauen Blitzes in Nuncius' Brust fährt. Nuncius ganzer Körper erzittert, als das Leben aus ihm weicht. Eogunn lässt die Hand des toten Mannes vorsichtig los und starrt ihn eine Weile an. Schließlich enthauptet er seinen Kollegen mit einer entschlossenen Bewegung seines Mechadendriten und nimmt den Kopf an sich. Dann nimmt er den über seiner Schulter schwebenden Servoschädel und legt ihn vor das Stasen-Sacellum.{/n} "Ich habe getan, was ich tun musste. Jetzt bin ich bereit, selbst den Weg der Buße zu beschreiten. Ich exkommuniziere mich selbst aus der Sekte der Xenariten und widme mich der Suche nach Wissen wie sie in Seinen Schwüren begründet ist. {name}, danke, dass Ihr mich begleitet habt."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's galvanic coils crackle, and a powerful discharge passes from his hands directly into Nuncius's chest in a flash of azure. Nuncius's entire body shudders, then goes still forever. Gently removing the dead man's hand from his own, Eogunn stares at him for a time. Finally, with a decisive swing of his mechadendrite, he cuts off his colleague's head, and takes it. Then, he takes the servo-skull that has been hovering at his shoulder and sets it at the foot of the stasis sacellum.{/n} "I have done what I had to do. I excommunicate myself from the xenarite sect and dedicate myself to the Quest for Knowledge as it has been established in His covenants. {name}, thank you for being with me."

Ich exkommuniziere mich selbst aus der Sekte der Xenariten und widme mich der Suche nach Wissen wie sie in Seinen Schwüren begründet ist. {name}, danke, dass Ihr mich begleitet habt."

languages.text: {n}エオガンのガルヴァニック・コイルが音を立て、強力な放電が、青の閃光となって彼の手から直接ヌンキウスの胸へと流れ込む。ヌンキウスの全身が震え、それから永遠に静止する。死者の手を自らの手からそっと外し、エオガンはしばらく彼を見つめる。ついに、機械触手を決然と振るい、彼は同僚の頭を切り落とし、それを手に取る。そして、肩のそばに浮かんでいたサーヴォスカルを取り、それをステイシス聖龕の足元に据える。{/n}「私はなすべきことをなしました。今、私自身が贖罪の道を歩む覚悟ができています。私はゼナライト派から自らを破門し、御方の聖約に定められたとおりの知識の探求に、自らを捧げます。{name}、共にいてくれて、ありがとう」
